hero.headline: Every donation safely reaches the shelters and collection centers.
hero.subheadline: We channel direct humanitarian aid to those affected by the July 24 earthquake tragedy. We purchase supplies in Barquisimeto and Caracas and deliver them to official collection centers and shelters in Caracas, La Guaira, and Barquisimeto. Non-profit.

how.title: How it works
how.step1_body: A direct, secure transfer from wherever you are. You get immediate confirmation.
how.step2_body: We purchase food, medicine, and water in Barquisimeto and Caracas. We deliver them directly to shelters and official collection centers, receipt in hand.
how.step3_body: Every shelter delivery is photographed before the cycle closes. No photo, no publication.
how.step4_body: The purchase, scanned invoice, and delivery photo are published on the Transparency Wall. Anyone can view them.

transparency.title: Transparency Wall
transparency.subtitle: Real purchases, real receipts, verified deliveries.
transparency.description: Here we visually and publicly demonstrate the use of every donation. Every physical purchase made in Barquisimeto has its audited receipt and delivery photo at the corresponding shelter.
transparency.empty_preview: No purchases registered at this time. Confirmed purchases will appear here.
transparency.search_subtitle: Enter the bank reference, last 4 digits, or your alias to verify the destination and purchases associated with your money in real time.
transparency.search_placeholder: e.g. Zelle from Carlos, Ref: 4521 or 982143...
transparency.allocated_pending_title: Your donation is about to be used
transparency.allocated_pending_body: We have received your contribution and it is being allocated to the next purchase of supplies for the shelters. Please check back in a few days to see how it was used. Thank you for your trust!
transparency.empty_category: No purchases registered in this category.

gallery_preview.title: Our Work in Images
gallery_preview.subtitle: Photos and moments captured in the field by our volunteer team.
gallery_preview.empty: No photos published at this time.

trust.title: Why trust SendHope?
trust.body: Every SendHope transaction ends with three things: a photo of the purchase, a scanned receipt, and a photo of the delivery at the shelter. The green seal you see on each entry isn't decorative — it means that cycle was fully completed.

closing.headline: Every dollar counts. Every purchase is verified.

footer.rights: SendHope Venezuela. Built with love from Barquisimeto.

pay_info.title: Donate right now
pay_info.subtitle: Transfer any amount you'd like and confirm it on our website so we can verify it.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: The people behind every purchase, every receipt, and every delivery in Barquisimeto, Caracas, and La Guaira.

about.title: Who are we?
about.description: We are a group of friends who, moved by the consequences of the June 24 earthquakes in Venezuela, decided to combine our disposition and desire to help to launch this initiative. Our purpose is to channel immediate humanitarian support for the affected families, focusing primarily on the well-being, nutrition, and care of young children.
about.future: With our eyes fixed on the future, we dream of growing this project, joining forces step by step to actively contribute to the reconstruction of our country.

donar.page_description: Choose an amount, make the transfer and confirm your reference. Your donation is registered and verified by the team.
donar.mini_hero_subtitle: Our team confirms your transfer within 24 hours. Every dollar is documented.
donar.trust_badge_alert: Your donation is registered and manually verified by the team within 24 hours.
donar.step1_title: How much would you like to donate?
donar.step2_subtitle: Choose your preferred method and send the amount you selected.
donar.step3_subtitle: This lets us verify your payment. Your name and email are never shown publicly.
donar.reference_hint: The code or reference your bank / Zelle gave you when completing the transfer.
donar.email_placeholder: Optional — we'll notify you when confirmed
donar.privacy_toggle_label: How would you like your donation to appear?
donar.public_option_hint: Your name will appear on the Transparency Wall
donar.anonymous_option_hint: Your donation is recorded without a visible name
donar.privacy_note: Your email will never be shown publicly.
donar.error_amount: Please choose or enter a valid amount.
donar.error_reference: A payment reference is required for verification.
donar.error_generic: Something went wrong. Try again or contact us directly.
donar.success_body: We received your transfer confirmation. Our team will verify it within a few hours and publish it on the Transparency Wall.

admin_auth.title: Control Panel
admin_auth.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the SendHope Venezuela backoffice.
admin_auth.register_subtitle: Create a new administrator account using the secret security code.
admin_auth.success_register: Account created successfully. You can now log in.
admin_auth.to_login_link: Already have an account, log in

gallery.page_description: Documentary photos of our team in the field: deliveries, logistics coordination, and moments of hope from supported shelters in Barquisimeto.
gallery.title: Team Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments captured by our team in the field. Every photo is evidence that our humanitarian aid work is real, human, and continuous.
gallery.cta_text: Every photo represents a life impacted. Your donation makes this possible.
gallery.empty_title: The gallery is about to begin
gallery.empty_body: Soon our team will post photos documenting our field work. Check back soon!

contact_page.page_description: Contact us to coordinate physical donations in Barquisimeto or ask questions. Non-profit initiative.
contact_page.title: Get in touch
contact_page.subtitle: Have questions, want to collaborate, or need to coordinate the delivery of physical donations in Barquisimeto? Write to us directly.
contact_page.about_body: SendHope Venezuela is an independent, non-profit organization born in response to the July 24 earthquake tragedy. We purchase supplies in Barquisimeto and Caracas and distribute them directly to official collection centers and shelters in Caracas, La Guaira, and Barquisimeto.
contact_page.about_transparency: We guarantee total transparency: every dollar or bolivar donated is allocated to direct purchases of food, medicine, and water, which are published with scanned receipts and delivery photos on our Transparency Wall.
contact_page.email_body: For institutional proposals, support, transfer questions, or administrative reports.
contact_page.physical_body: You can coordinate the delivery of clothing, blankets, water, or food directly in Barquisimeto via WhatsApp:
